Load Spatial Demo Datasets for Testing

Source: R/LoadSpatialDemoData.R
load_spatial_demo_data.Rd

Load various spatial datasets from SeuratData for testing spatial data conversion functionality.

Usage

load_spatial_demo_data(
  datasets = c("stxBrain", "stxKidney", "ssHippo"),
  install_missing = TRUE,
  verbose = TRUE
)

Arguments

datasets

Character vector of dataset names to load. Defaults to c("stxBrain", "stxKidney", "ssHippo")

install_missing

Logical; if TRUE, install missing datasets

verbose

Logical; show progress messages

Value

A named list of Seurat objects

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# Load required libraries
library(Seurat)
library(srtdisk)

# Install and load spatial datasets
load_spatial_demo_data()
} # }
